data.content:
# Implementation Plan: Support Claude Opus 4.7 model selection

## Complexity: Low
Straightforward addition of a new model ID to existing lists. No new logic required.

## Changes

### 1. src/lib/settings-agent-scan.ts — Static model catalog (line 24)
- Add "claude-opus-4-7" to the claude array in STATIC_PROVIDER_MODEL_IDS
- Place it first in the list (newest model first)

### 2. src/lib/settings-agent-scan.ts — Copilot credits map (line 80)
- Add "claude-opus-4.7" entry to COPILOT_CREDITS (Copilot uses dot notation)
- Set credits to 3 (same as other Opus models)

### 3. scripts/agent-wizard.sh — CLI model discovery (line 176)
- Already lists "sonnet opus haiku" as flavor names
- No change needed; normalizeClaudeModel handles version extraction

## Risks
- None significant. normalizeClaudeModel regex already handles opus-X.Y patterns.
- Copilot credit value of 3 is estimated.

## Test Strategy
1. Run bun run lint and bunx tsc --noEmit
2. Run bun run test
3. Start dev server, verify Opus 4.7 in settings UI model dropdown
4. Select Opus 4.7 in UI, confirm persistence to config
